landing.heroDesc: A collaborative network of 6 specialized AI agents continuously monitoring, analyzing, and optimizing your farm's operations in real-time.

crop.title: Crop Monitoring
crop.desc: Real-time health tracking via satellite and drone imagery.

irrigation.title: Smart Irrigation
irrigation.desc: Optimize water usage based on soil moisture and weather.

pest.title: Pest Detection
pest.desc: Early warning system for diseases and pest infestations.

market.title: Market Intelligence
market.desc: Analyze price trends for optimal selling times.

advisor.title: Farm Advisor
advisor.desc: Voice and mobile guidance for data-driven decisions.

login.title: Agent Control Panel
login.subtitle: Authenticate to access the autonomous network
login.secureText: Secure connection via gRPC • End-to-end encrypted

dashboard.title: Autonomous Operations
dashboard.subtitle: Monitoring 6 active AI agents across the farm network.
dashboard.manualSync: Manual sync requested. Polling all agents...
dashboard.aiSuggestionText: Based on current data, your farm's health is optimal. Consider scheduling irrigation for sector 4 tomorrow morning to maintain soil moisture.

agents.irrigationSuggestion: Moisture dropping in sector 2; schedule watering.
agents.pestSuggestion: No immediate threats detected. Maintain current drone patrols.
agents.weatherSuggestion: Heavy rain expected tomorrow. Delay pesticide application.

agents.advisorSuggestion: Review recent system insights for further optimization opportunities.
